message:
chore: bump version to 0.2.3 for release

Changes since 0.2.2:
- feat(encode): fallible try_* async encode API (non-panicking variant)
- perf(encode/folding): avoid cloning folded_key when no path prefix
- fix(decode): cap declared array length and path-expansion recursion
- fix(string_utils): guard out-of-bounds start in find_closing_quote
- chore: bump asupersync dep 0.2.9 -> 0.3.1 (via crates.io)
- chore: add inline unit-test modules across cli/decode/encode/options

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "tru"
-version = "0.2.2"
+version = "0.2.3"
 edition = "2024"
 rust-version = "1.88"
 description = "TOON reference implementation in Rust (JSON <-> TOON)"
